headline: Bitcoin Plunges Below $71K, Bulls Buy the Dip

headline: Short Seller Left Fined $3.3M in Landmark Case

article.title: Andrew Left Found Guilty in Case That Spooked Short Sellers
article.summary: Famed short seller Andrew Left faces the possibility of decades behind bars after being found guilty of using disingenuous social media posts to manipulate stocks, in a landmark case that threatens to chill a broader trading strategy loathed by corporate executives.

headline: Left Fined $10M in Market Manipulation Case

article.title: What's Next After Short Seller Andrew Left Found Guilty
article.summary: Andrew Left, one of the world’s most prominent short sellers, was found guilty of securities fraud by a US federal jury. Bloomberg's Erik Larson reports on the latest. (Corrects name in headline.) (Source: Bloomberg)
